description: Style noteA wallet is a subtle style essential, and every cosmopolitan man who knows the sartorial rights and wrongs needs a wallet like this one! This peter england wallet, with it stylish upper and practical, functional inner is an accessory must-have! Product Details Two main compartments Two slip pockets on either side Four credit card slots with a flap over and a transparent id card slot on the left Zipped pocket on the right for coins with two card slots below Branding embossed on the front Material and Care 100% leather Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size Dimensions: 10.5 cm x 9 cm
